lessons.title: Colors in Korean
lessons.content: Red: 빨강 (ppalgang), Blue: 파랑 (parang), Green: 초록 (chorok), Yellow: 노랑 (norang).

lessons.title: Numbers 1-10
lessons.content: 1: 하나 (hana), 2: 둘 (dul), 3: 셋 (set), 4: 넷 (net), 5: 다섯 (daseot), 6: 여섯 (yeoseot), 7: 일곱 (ilgop), 8: 여덟 (yeodeol), 9: 아홉 (ahop), 10: 열 (yeol).

lessons.title: Greetings
lessons.content: Hello: 안녕하세요 (annyeonghaseyo), Hi: 안녕 (annyeong), Goodbye: 안녕히 가세요 (annyeonghi gaseyo).

lessons.title: Days of the Week
lessons.content: Monday: 월요일 (woryoil), Tuesday: 화요일 (hwayoil), Wednesday: 수요일 (suyoil), Thursday: 목요일 (mogyoil), Friday: 금요일 (geumyoil), Saturday: 토요일 (toyoil), Sunday: 일요일 (iryoil).

lessons.title: Family Members
lessons.content: Mother: 엄마 (eomma), Father: 아빠 (appa), Brother: 형/오빠 (hyeong/oppa), Sister: 누나/언니 (nuna/eonni).

lessons.title: Basic Verbs
lessons.content: To eat: 먹다 (meokda), To go: 가다 (gada), To do: 하다 (hada), To see: 보다 (boda).

lessons.title: School Objects
lessons.content: Pen: 펜 (pen), Book: 책 (chaek), Notebook: 공책 (gongchaek), Chair: 의자 (uija).

lessons.title: Common Phrases
lessons.content: Thank you: 감사합니다 (gamsahamnida), Please: 제발 (jebal), How are you?: 어떻게 지내세요? (eotteohge jinaeseyo?).

lessons.title: Food Vocabulary
lessons.content: Rice: 밥 (bap), Water: 물 (mul), Apple: 사과 (sagwa), Cheese: 치즈 (chijeu).

lessons.title: Simple Sentences
lessons.content: I am happy: 나는 행복해요 (naneun haengbokhaeyo), I have a book: 나는 책이 있어요 (naneun chaegi isseoyo).

lessons.title: Travel Phrases
lessons.content: Where is…?: 어디에 있어요? (eodie isseoyo?), I need help: 도움이 필요해요 (doumi piryohaeyo).

lessons.title: Advanced Expressions
lessons.content: Better late than never: 늦더라도 안 하는 것보다 낫다 (neutdeorado an haneun geotboda natda), It's raining heavily: 비가 억수같이 내린다 (biga eoksugat-i naerinda).
